findings.detail: The generated guidance interpolates arbitrary filesystem paths into shell commands without quoting. Repro 1: for target root `C:\Work\My Repo`, step 1 prints `cd C:\Work\My Repo`, which PowerShell 5.1 parses as multiple arguments and fails before install. Repro 2: a pre-install untracked file `notes today.txt` produces `git stash push -u -- notes today.txt`; the shell splits it into two pathspecs, so the file remains dirty or the command errors and `req:new --run` stays blocked. This phase explicitly targets Windows-compatible, follow-the-output guidance, so unquoted path serialization breaks its completion criterion.

next_action: Builder는 supported shell(s)에 맞는 path-quoting helper를 적용하거나 경로를 명령 문자열에 직접 삽입하지 않는 형태로 안내를 바꾸십시오. 공백이 있는 target root와 unrelated 파일명을 포함한 PowerShell 5.1 안내 테스트를 추가한 뒤 다시 요청하십시오.
